items.description: A list of Timestream for InfluxDB cluster summaries.

nextToken.description: Token from a previous call of the operation. When this value is provided, the service returns results from where the previous response left off.

id.description: Service-generated unique identifier of the DB cluster to retrieve.

name.description: Customer supplied name of the Timestream for InfluxDB cluster.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB cluster.

endpoint.description: The endpoint used to connect to the Timestream for InfluxDB cluster for write and read operations.

readerEndpoint.description: The endpoint used to connect to the Timestream for InfluxDB cluster for read-only operations.

port.description: The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections.

dbInstanceType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB DB instance type that InfluxDB runs on.

networkType.description: Specifies whether the network type of the Timestream for InfluxDB Cluster is IPv4, which can communicate over IPv4 protocol only, or DUAL, which can communicate over both IPv4 and IPv6 protocols.

dbStorageType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB DB storage type that InfluxDB stores data on.

allocatedStorage.description: The amount of storage allocated for your DB storage type (in gibibytes).

engineType.description: The engine type of your DB cluster.

items.description: A list of Timestream for InfluxDB DB instance summaries.

nextToken.description: Token from a previous call of the operation. When this value is provided, the service returns results from where the previous response left off.

id.description: The service-generated unique identifier of the DB instance.

name.description: This customer-supplied name uniquely identifies the DB instance when interacting with the Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB API and CLI commands.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB instance.

endpoint.description: The endpoint used to connect to InfluxDB. The default InfluxDB port is 8086.

port.description: The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections.

networkType.description: Specifies whether the networkType of the Timestream for InfluxDB instance is IPV4, which can communicate over IPv4 protocol only, or DUAL, which can communicate over both IPv4 and IPv6 protocols.

dbInstanceType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB instance type to run InfluxDB on.

dbStorageType.description: The storage type for your DB instance.

allocatedStorage.description: The amount of storage to allocate for your DbStorageType in GiB (gibibytes).

deploymentType.description: Single-Instance or with a MultiAZ Standby for High availability.

items.description: A list of Timestream for InfluxDB DB parameter group summaries.

nextToken.description: Token from a previous call of the operation. When this value is provided, the service returns results from where the previous response left off.

name.description: This customer-supplied name uniquely identifies the parameter group.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB parameter group.

description.description: A description of the DB parameter group.

name.description: The customer-supplied name that uniquely identifies the DB instance when interacting with the Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB API and CLI commands.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB instance.

endpoint.description: The endpoint used to connect to InfluxDB. The default InfluxDB port is 8086.

port.description: The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections. The default value is 8086.

networkType.description: Specifies whether the networkType of the Timestream for InfluxDB instance is IPV4, which can communicate over IPv4 protocol only, or DUAL, which can communicate over both IPv4 and IPv6 protocols.

dbInstanceType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB instance type that InfluxDB runs on.

dbStorageType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB DB storage type that InfluxDB stores data on.

allocatedStorage.description: The amount of storage allocated for your DB storage type (in gibibytes).

deploymentType.description: Specifies whether the Timestream for InfluxDB is deployed as Single-AZ or with a MultiAZ Standby for High availability.

vpcSubnetIds.description: A list of VPC subnet IDs associated with the DB instance.

publiclyAccessible.description: Indicates if the DB instance has a public IP to facilitate access.

vpcSecurityGroupIds.description: A list of VPC security group IDs associated with the DB instance.

dbParameterGroupIdentifier.description: The id of the DB parameter group assigned to your DB instance.

availabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone in which the DB instance resides.

secondaryAvailabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone in which the standby instance is located when deploying with a MultiAZ standby instance.

logDeliveryConfiguration.description: Configuration for sending InfluxDB engine logs to send to specified S3 bucket.

influxAuthParametersSecretArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Secrets Manager secret containing the initial InfluxDB authorization parameters. The secret value is a JSON formatted key-value pair holding InfluxDB authorization values: organization, bucket, username, and password.

dbClusterId.description: Specifies the DbCluster to which this DbInstance belongs to.

instanceMode.description: Specifies the DbInstance's role in the cluster.

instanceModes.description: Specifies the DbInstance's roles in the cluster.

name.description: The customer-supplied name that uniquely identifies the DB parameter group when interacting with the Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB API and CLI commands.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARM) of the DB parameter group.

description.description: The description of the DB parameter group.

parameters.description: A list of the parameters that comprise the DB parameter group.

InfluxDBv2.description: All the customer-modifiable InfluxDB v2 parameters in Timestream for InfluxDB.

fluxLogEnabled.description:
Include option to show detailed logs for Flux queries.

Default: false

logLevel.description:
Log output level. InfluxDB outputs log entries with severity levels greater than or equal to the level specified.

Default: info

noTasks.description:
Disable the task scheduler. If problematic tasks prevent InfluxDB from starting, use this option to start InfluxDB without scheduling or executing tasks.

Default: false

queryConcurrency.description:
Number of queries allowed to execute concurrently. Setting to 0 allows an unlimited number of concurrent queries.

Default: 0

queryQueueSize.description:
Maximum number of queries allowed in execution queue. When queue limit is reached, new queries are rejected. Setting to 0 allows an unlimited number of queries in the queue.

Default: 0

tracingType.description: Enable tracing in InfluxDB and specifies the tracing type. Tracing is disabled by default.

metricsDisabled.description:
Disable the HTTP /metrics endpoint which exposes internal InfluxDB metrics.

Default: false

httpIdleTimeout.description:
Maximum duration the server should keep established connections alive while waiting for new requests. Set to 0 for no timeout.

Default: 3 minutes

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

httpReadHeaderTimeout.description:
Maximum duration the server should try to read HTTP headers for new requests. Set to 0 for no timeout.

Default: 10 seconds

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

httpReadTimeout.description:
Maximum duration the server should try to read the entirety of new requests. Set to 0 for no timeout.

Default: 0

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

httpWriteTimeout.description:
Maximum duration the server should spend processing and responding to write requests. Set to 0 for no timeout.

Default: 0

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

influxqlMaxSelectBuckets.description:
Maximum number of group by time buckets a SELECT statement can create. 0 allows an unlimited number of buckets.

Default: 0

influxqlMaxSelectPoint.description:
Maximum number of points a SELECT statement can process. 0 allows an unlimited number of points. InfluxDB checks the point count every second (so queries exceeding the maximum aren’t immediately aborted).

Default: 0

influxqlMaxSelectSeries.description:
Maximum number of series a SELECT statement can return. 0 allows an unlimited number of series.

Default: 0

pprofDisabled.description:
Disable the /debug/pprof HTTP endpoint. This endpoint provides runtime profiling data and can be helpful when debugging.

Default: true

queryInitialMemoryBytes.description:
Initial bytes of memory allocated for a query.

Default: 0

queryMaxMemoryBytes.description:
Maximum number of queries allowed in execution queue. When queue limit is reached, new queries are rejected. Setting to 0 allows an unlimited number of queries in the queue.

Default: 0

queryMemoryBytes.description:
Maximum bytes of memory allowed for a single query. Must be greater or equal to queryInitialMemoryBytes.

Default: 0

sessionLength.description:
Specifies the Time to Live (TTL) in minutes for newly created user sessions.

Default: 60

sessionRenewDisabled.description:
Disables automatically extending a user’s session TTL on each request. By default, every request sets the session’s expiration time to five minutes from now. When disabled, sessions expire after the specified session length and the user is redirected to the login page, even if recently active.

Default: false

storageCacheMaxMemorySize.description:
Maximum size (in bytes) a shard’s cache can reach before it starts rejecting writes. Must be greater than storageCacheSnapShotMemorySize and lower than instance’s total memory capacity. We recommend setting it to below 15% of the total memory capacity.

Default: 1073741824

storageCacheSnapshotMemorySize.description:
Size (in bytes) at which the storage engine will snapshot the cache and write it to a TSM file to make more memory available. Must not be greater than storageCacheMaxMemorySize.

Default: 26214400

storageCacheSnapshotWriteColdDuration.description:
Duration at which the storage engine will snapshot the cache and write it to a new TSM file if the shard hasn’t received writes or deletes.

Default: 10 minutes

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

storageCompactFullWriteColdDuration.description:
Duration at which the storage engine will compact all TSM files in a shard if it hasn't received writes or deletes.

Default: 4 hours

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

storageCompactThroughputBurst.description:
Rate limit (in bytes per second) that TSM compactions can write to disk.

Default: 50331648

storageMaxConcurrentCompactions.description:
Maximum number of full and level compactions that can run concurrently. A value of 0 results in 50% of runtime.GOMAXPROCS(0) used at runtime. Any number greater than zero limits compactions to that value. This setting does not apply to cache snapshotting.

Default: 0

storageMaxIndexLogFileSize.description:
Size (in bytes) at which an index write-ahead log (WAL) file will compact into an index file. Lower sizes will cause log files to be compacted more quickly and result in lower heap usage at the expense of write throughput.

Default: 1048576

storageNoValidateFieldSize.description:
Skip field size validation on incoming write requests.

Default: false

storageRetentionCheckInterval.description:
Interval of retention policy enforcement checks. Must be greater than 0.

Default: 30 minutes

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

storageSeriesFileMaxConcurrentSnapshotCo.description:
Maximum number of snapshot compactions that can run concurrently across all series partitions in a database.

Default: 0

storageSeriesIdSetCacheSize.description:
Size of the internal cache used in the TSI index to store previously calculated series results. Cached results are returned quickly rather than needing to be recalculated when a subsequent query with the same tag key/value predicate is executed. Setting this value to 0 will disable the cache and may decrease query performance.

Default: 100

storageWalMaxConcurrentWrites.description:
Maximum number writes to the WAL directory to attempt at the same time. Setting this value to 0 results in number of processing units available x2.

Default: 0

storageWalMaxWriteDelay.description:
Maximum amount of time a write request to the WAL directory will wait when the maximum number of concurrent active writes to the WAL directory has been met. Set to 0 to disable the timeout.

Default: 10 minutes

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

uiDisabled.description:
Disable the InfluxDB user interface (UI). The UI is enabled by default.

Default: false

InfluxDBv3Core.description: All the customer-modifiable InfluxDB v3 Core parameters in Timestream for InfluxDB.

queryFileLimit.description:
Limits the number of Parquet files a query can access. If a query attempts to read more than this limit, InfluxDB 3 returns an error.

Default: 432

queryLogSize.description:
Defines the size of the query log. Up to this many queries remain in the log before older queries are evicted to make room for new ones.

Default: 1000

logFormat.description:
Defines the message format for logs.

Default: full

dataFusionNumThreads.description: Sets the maximum number of DataFusion runtime threads to use.

dataFusionRuntimeType.description:
Specifies the DataFusion tokio runtime type.

Default: multi-thread

dataFusionRuntimeDisableLifoSlot.description: Disables the LIFO slot of the DataFusion runtime.

dataFusionRuntimeEventInterval.description: Sets the number of scheduler ticks after which the scheduler of the DataFusion tokio runtime polls for external events–for example: timers, I/O.

dataFusionRuntimeGlobalQueueInterval.description: Sets the number of scheduler ticks after which the scheduler of the DataFusion runtime polls the global task queue.

dataFusionRuntimeMaxBlockingThreads.description: Specifies the limit for additional threads spawned by the DataFusion runtime.

dataFusionRuntimeMaxIoEventsPerTick.description: Configures the maximum number of events processed per tick by the tokio DataFusion runtime.

dataFusionRuntimeThreadKeepAlive.description: Sets a custom timeout for a thread in the blocking pool of the tokio DataFusion runtime.

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

dataFusionRuntimeThreadPriority.description:
Sets the thread priority for tokio DataFusion runtime workers.

Default: 10

dataFusionMaxParquetFanout.description:
When multiple parquet files are required in a sorted way (deduplication for example), specifies the maximum fanout.

Default: 1000

dataFusionUseCachedParquetLoader.description: Uses a cached parquet loader when reading parquet files from the object store.

dataFusionConfig.description: Provides custom configuration to DataFusion as a comma-separated list of key:value pairs.

maxHttpRequestSize.description:
Specifies the maximum size of HTTP requests.

Default: 10485760

forceSnapshotMemThreshold.description:
Specifies the threshold for the internal memory buffer. Supports either a percentage (portion of available memory) or absolute value in MB–for example: 70% or 100

Default: 70%

walSnapshotSize.description:
Defines the number of WAL files to attempt to remove in a snapshot. This, multiplied by the interval, determines how often snapshots are taken.

Default: 600

walMaxWriteBufferSize.description:
Specifies the maximum number of write requests that can be buffered before a flush must be executed and succeed.

Default: 100000

snapshottedWalFilesToKeep.description:
Specifies the number of snapshotted WAL files to retain in the object store. Flushing the WAL files does not clear the WAL files immediately; they are deleted when the number of snapshotted WAL files exceeds this number.

Default: 300

preemptiveCacheAge.description:
Specifies the interval to prefetch into the Parquet cache during compaction.

Default: 3d

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

parquetMemCachePrunePercentage.description:
Specifies the percentage of entries to prune during a prune operation on the in-memory Parquet cache.

Default: 0.1

parquetMemCachePruneInterval.description:
Sets the interval to check if the in-memory Parquet cache needs to be pruned.

Default: 1s

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

disableParquetMemCache.description: Disables the in-memory Parquet cache. By default, the cache is enabled.

parquetMemCacheQueryPathDuration.description:
Specifies the time window for caching recent Parquet files in memory.

Default: 5h

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

lastCacheEvictionInterval.description:
Specifies the interval to evict expired entries from the Last-N-Value cache, expressed as a human-readable duration–for example: 20s, 1m, 1h.

Default: 10s

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

distinctCacheEvictionInterval.description:
Specifies the interval to evict expired entries from the distinct value cache, expressed as a human-readable duration–for example: 20s, 1m, 1h.

Default: 10s

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

gen1Duration.description:
Specifies the duration that Parquet files are arranged into. Data timestamps land each row into a file of this duration. Supported durations are 1m, 5m, and 10m. These files are known as “generation 1” files that the compactor in InfluxDB 3 Enterprise can merge into larger generations.

Default: 10m

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

execMemPoolBytes.description:
Specifies the size of memory pool used during query execution. Can be given as absolute value in bytes or as a percentage of the total available memory–for example: 8000000000 or 10%.

Default: 20%

parquetMemCacheSize.description:
Specifies the size of the in-memory Parquet cache in megabytes or percentage of total available memory.

Default: 20%

walReplayFailOnError.description:
Determines whether WAL replay should fail when encountering errors.

Default: false

walReplayConcurrencyLimit.description:
Concurrency limit during WAL replay. Setting this number too high can lead to OOM. The default is dynamically determined.

Default: max(num_cpus, 10)

tableIndexCacheMaxEntries.description:
Specifies the maximum number of entries in the table index cache.

Default: 1000

tableIndexCacheConcurrencyLimit.description:
Limits the concurrency level for table index cache operations.

Default: 8

gen1LookbackDuration.description:
Specifies how far back to look when creating generation 1 Parquet files.

Default: 24h

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

retentionCheckInterval.description:
The interval at which retention policies are checked and enforced. Enter as a human-readable time–for example: 30m or 1h.

Default: 30m

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

deleteGracePeriod.description:
Specifies the grace period before permanently deleting data.

Default: 24h

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

hardDeleteDefaultDuration.description:
Sets the default duration for hard deletion of data.

Default: 90d

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

InfluxDBv3Enterprise.description: All the customer-modifiable InfluxDB v3 Enterprise parameters in Timestream for InfluxDB.

Default: 432

queryLogSize.description:
Defines the size of the query log. Up to this many queries remain in the log before older queries are evicted to make room for new ones.

Default: 1000

logFormat.description:
Defines the message format for logs.

Default: full

dataFusionRuntimeType.description:
Specifies the DataFusion tokio runtime type.

Default: multi-thread

dataFusionRuntimeDisableLifoSlot.description: Disables the LIFO slot of the DataFusion runtime.

dataFusionRuntimeMaxIoEventsPerTick.description: Configures the maximum number of events processed per tick by the tokio DataFusion runtime.

dataFusionRuntimeThreadKeepAlive.description: Sets a custom timeout for a thread in the blocking pool of the tokio DataFusion runtime.

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

dataFusionRuntimeThreadPriority.description:
Sets the thread priority for tokio DataFusion runtime workers.

Default: 10

dataFusionMaxParquetFanout.description:
When multiple parquet files are required in a sorted way (deduplication for example), specifies the maximum fanout.

Default: 1000

dataFusionUseCachedParquetLoader.description: Uses a cached parquet loader when reading parquet files from the object store.

Specifies the maximum size of HTTP requests.

Default: 10485760

parquetMemCachePruneInterval.description:

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

disableParquetMemCache.description: Disables the in-memory Parquet cache. By default, the cache is enabled.

parquetMemCacheQueryPathDuration.description:
Specifies the time window for caching recent Parquet files in memory.

Default: 5h

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

lastCacheEvictionInterval.description:
Specifies the interval to evict expired entries from the Last-N-Value cache, expressed as a human-readable duration–for example: 20s, 1m, 1h.

Default: 10s

Specifies the interval to evict expired entries from the distinct value cache, expressed as a human-readable duration–for example: 20s, 1m, 1h.

Default: 10s

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

gen1Duration.description:
Specifies the duration that Parquet files are arranged into. Data timestamps land each row into a file of this duration. Supported durations are 1m, 5m, and 10m. These files are known as “generation 1” files, which the compactor can merge into larger generations.

Default: 10m

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

execMemPoolBytes.description:
Specifies the size of memory pool used during query execution. Can be given as absolute value in bytes or as a percentage of the total available memory–for example: 8000000000 or 10%.

Default: 20%

Specifies the size of the in-memory Parquet cache in megabytes or percentage of total available memory.

Default: 20%

Determines whether WAL replay should fail when encountering errors.

Default: false

walReplayConcurrencyLimit.description:
Concurrency limit during WAL replay. Setting this number too high can lead to OOM. The default is dynamically determined.

Default: max(num_cpus, 10)

tableIndexCacheMaxEntries.description:
Specifies the maximum number of entries in the table index cache.

Default: 1000

Default: 8

gen1LookbackDuration.description:
Specifies how far back to look when creating generation 1 Parquet files.

Default: 24h

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

retentionCheckInterval.description:
The interval at which retention policies are checked and enforced. Enter as a human-readable time–for example: 30m or 1h.

Default: 30m

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

deleteGracePeriod.description:
Specifies the grace period before permanently deleting data.

Default: 24h

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

hardDeleteDefaultDuration.description:
Sets the default duration for hard deletion of data.

Default: 90d

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

ingestQueryInstances.description: Specifies number of instances in the DbCluster which can both ingest and query.

queryOnlyInstances.description: Specifies number of instances in the DbCluster which can only query.

dedicatedCompactor.description: Specifies if the compactor instance should be a standalone instance or not.

compactionRowLimit.description:
Specifies the soft limit for the number of rows per file that the compactor writes. The compactor may write more rows than this limit.

Default: 1000000

compactionMaxNumFilesPerPlan.description:
Sets the maximum number of files included in any compaction plan.

Default: 500

compactionGen2Duration.description:
Specifies the duration of the first level of compaction (gen2). Later levels of compaction are multiples of this duration. This value should be equal to or greater than the gen1 duration.

Default: 20m

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

compactionMultipliers.description:
Specifies a comma-separated list of multiples defining the duration of each level of compaction. The number of elements in the list determines the number of compaction levels. The first element specifies the duration of the first level (gen3); subsequent levels are multiples of the previous level.

Default: 3,4,6,5

compactionCleanupWait.description:
Specifies the amount of time that the compactor waits after finishing a compaction run to delete files marked as needing deletion during that compaction run.

Default: 10m

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

compactionCheckInterval.description:
Specifies how often the compactor checks for new compaction work to perform.

Default: 10s

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

lastValueCacheDisableFromHistory.description: Disables populating the last-N-value cache from historical data. If disabled, the cache is still populated with data from the write-ahead log (WAL).

distinctValueCacheDisableFromHistory.description: Disables populating the distinct value cache from historical data. If disabled, the cache is still populated with data from the write-ahead log (WAL).

replicationInterval.description:
Specifies the interval at which data replication occurs between cluster nodes.

Default: 250ms

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

catalogSyncInterval.description:
Defines how often the catalog synchronizes across cluster nodes.

Default: 10s

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

name.description: The customer-supplied name that uniquely identifies the DB instance when interacting with the Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB API and CLI commands.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB instance.

endpoint.description: The endpoint used to connect to InfluxDB. The default InfluxDB port is 8086.

port.description: The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections.

networkType.description: Specifies whether the networkType of the Timestream for InfluxDB instance is IPV4, which can communicate over IPv4 protocol only, or DUAL, which can communicate over both IPv4 and IPv6 protocols.

dbInstanceType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB instance type that InfluxDB runs on.

dbStorageType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB DB storage type that InfluxDB stores data on.

allocatedStorage.description: The amount of storage allocated for your DB storage type (in gibibytes).

deploymentType.description: Specifies whether the Timestream for InfluxDB is deployed as Single-AZ or with a MultiAZ Standby for High availability.

vpcSubnetIds.description: A list of VPC subnet IDs associated with the DB instance.

publiclyAccessible.description: Indicates if the DB instance has a public IP to facilitate access.

vpcSecurityGroupIds.description: A list of VPC security group IDs associated with the DB instance.

dbParameterGroupIdentifier.description: The id of the DB parameter group assigned to your DB instance.

availabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone in which the DB instance resides.

secondaryAvailabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone in which the standby instance is located when deploying with a MultiAZ standby instance.

logDeliveryConfiguration.description: Configuration for sending InfluxDB engine logs to send to specified S3 bucket.

influxAuthParametersSecretArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Secrets Manager secret containing the initial InfluxDB authorization parameters. The secret value is a JSON formatted key-value pair holding InfluxDB authorization values: organization, bucket, username, and password.

dbClusterId.description: Specifies the DbCluster to which this DbInstance belongs to.

instanceMode.description: Specifies the DbInstance's role in the cluster.

instanceModes.description: Specifies the DbInstance's roles in the cluster.

id.description: Service-generated unique identifier of the DB cluster to retrieve.

name.description: Customer-supplied name of the Timestream for InfluxDB cluster.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB cluster.

endpoint.description: The endpoint used to connect to the Timestream for InfluxDB cluster for write and read operations.

readerEndpoint.description: The endpoint used to connect to the Timestream for InfluxDB cluster for read-only operations.

port.description: The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections.

dbInstanceType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB instance type that InfluxDB runs on.

networkType.description: Specifies whether the network type of the Timestream for InfluxDB cluster is IPv4, which can communicate over IPv4 protocol only, or DUAL, which can communicate over both IPv4 and IPv6 protocols.

dbStorageType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB DB storage type that InfluxDB stores data on.

allocatedStorage.description: The amount of storage allocated for your DB storage type (in gibibytes).

engineType.description: The engine type of your DB cluster.

publiclyAccessible.description: Indicates if the DB cluster has a public IP to facilitate access from outside the VPC.

dbParameterGroupIdentifier.description: The ID of the DB parameter group assigned to your DB cluster.

logDeliveryConfiguration.description: Configuration for sending InfluxDB engine logs to send to specified S3 bucket.

influxAuthParametersSecretArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Secrets Manager secret containing the initial InfluxDB authorization parameters. The secret value is a JSON formatted key-value pair holding InfluxDB authorization values: organization, bucket, username, and password.

vpcSubnetIds.description: A list of VPC subnet IDs associated with the DB cluster.

vpcSecurityGroupIds.description: A list of VPC security group IDs associated with the DB cluster.

failoverMode.description: The configured failover mode for the DB cluster.

name.description: The customer-supplied name that uniquely identifies the DB instance when interacting with the Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB API and CLI commands.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB instance.

endpoint.description: The endpoint used to connect to InfluxDB. The default InfluxDB port is 8086.

port.description: The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections.

networkType.description: Specifies whether the networkType of the Timestream for InfluxDB instance is IPV4, which can communicate over IPv4 protocol only, or DUAL, which can communicate over both IPv4 and IPv6 protocols.

dbInstanceType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB instance type that InfluxDB runs on.

dbStorageType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB DB storage type that InfluxDB stores data on.

allocatedStorage.description: The amount of storage allocated for your DB storage type (in gibibytes).

deploymentType.description: Specifies whether the Timestream for InfluxDB is deployed as Single-AZ or with a MultiAZ Standby for High availability.

vpcSubnetIds.description: A list of VPC subnet IDs associated with the DB instance.

publiclyAccessible.description: Indicates if the DB instance has a public IP to facilitate access.

vpcSecurityGroupIds.description: A list of VPC security group IDs associated with the DB instance.

dbParameterGroupIdentifier.description: The id of the DB parameter group assigned to your DB instance.

availabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone in which the DB instance resides.

secondaryAvailabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone in which the standby instance is located when deploying with a MultiAZ standby instance.

logDeliveryConfiguration.description: Configuration for sending InfluxDB engine logs to send to specified S3 bucket.

influxAuthParametersSecretArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Secrets Manager secret containing the initial InfluxDB authorization parameters. The secret value is a JSON formatted key-value pair holding InfluxDB authorization values: organization, bucket, username, and password.

dbClusterId.description: Specifies the DbCluster to which this DbInstance belongs to.

instanceMode.description: Specifies the DbInstance's role in the cluster.

instanceModes.description: Specifies the DbInstance's roles in the cluster.

name.description: The customer-supplied name that uniquely identifies the DB parameter group when interacting with the Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB API and CLI commands.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB parameter group.

description.description: A description of the DB parameter group.

parameters.description: The parameters that comprise the DB parameter group.

InfluxDBv2.description: All the customer-modifiable InfluxDB v2 parameters in Timestream for InfluxDB.

fluxLogEnabled.description:
Include option to show detailed logs for Flux queries.

Default: false

logLevel.description:
Log output level. InfluxDB outputs log entries with severity levels greater than or equal to the level specified.

Default: info

noTasks.description:
Disable the task scheduler. If problematic tasks prevent InfluxDB from starting, use this option to start InfluxDB without scheduling or executing tasks.

Default: false

queryConcurrency.description:
Number of queries allowed to execute concurrently. Setting to 0 allows an unlimited number of concurrent queries.

Default: 0

queryQueueSize.description:
Maximum number of queries allowed in execution queue. When queue limit is reached, new queries are rejected. Setting to 0 allows an unlimited number of queries in the queue.

Default: 0

tracingType.description: Enable tracing in InfluxDB and specifies the tracing type. Tracing is disabled by default.

metricsDisabled.description:
Disable the HTTP /metrics endpoint which exposes internal InfluxDB metrics.

Default: false

httpIdleTimeout.description:
Maximum duration the server should keep established connections alive while waiting for new requests. Set to 0 for no timeout.

Default: 3 minutes

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

httpReadHeaderTimeout.description:
Maximum duration the server should try to read HTTP headers for new requests. Set to 0 for no timeout.

Default: 10 seconds

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

httpReadTimeout.description:
Maximum duration the server should try to read the entirety of new requests. Set to 0 for no timeout.

Default: 0

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

httpWriteTimeout.description:
Maximum duration the server should spend processing and responding to write requests. Set to 0 for no timeout.

Default: 0

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

influxqlMaxSelectBuckets.description:
Maximum number of group by time buckets a SELECT statement can create. 0 allows an unlimited number of buckets.

Default: 0

influxqlMaxSelectPoint.description:
Maximum number of points a SELECT statement can process. 0 allows an unlimited number of points. InfluxDB checks the point count every second (so queries exceeding the maximum aren’t immediately aborted).

Default: 0

influxqlMaxSelectSeries.description:
Maximum number of series a SELECT statement can return. 0 allows an unlimited number of series.

Default: 0

pprofDisabled.description:
Disable the /debug/pprof HTTP endpoint. This endpoint provides runtime profiling data and can be helpful when debugging.

Default: true

queryInitialMemoryBytes.description:
Initial bytes of memory allocated for a query.

Default: 0

queryMaxMemoryBytes.description:
Maximum number of queries allowed in execution queue. When queue limit is reached, new queries are rejected. Setting to 0 allows an unlimited number of queries in the queue.

Default: 0

queryMemoryBytes.description:
Maximum bytes of memory allowed for a single query. Must be greater or equal to queryInitialMemoryBytes.

Default: 0

sessionLength.description:
Specifies the Time to Live (TTL) in minutes for newly created user sessions.

Default: 60

sessionRenewDisabled.description:
Disables automatically extending a user’s session TTL on each request. By default, every request sets the session’s expiration time to five minutes from now. When disabled, sessions expire after the specified session length and the user is redirected to the login page, even if recently active.

Default: false

storageCacheMaxMemorySize.description:
Maximum size (in bytes) a shard’s cache can reach before it starts rejecting writes. Must be greater than storageCacheSnapShotMemorySize and lower than instance’s total memory capacity. We recommend setting it to below 15% of the total memory capacity.

Default: 1073741824

storageCacheSnapshotMemorySize.description:
Size (in bytes) at which the storage engine will snapshot the cache and write it to a TSM file to make more memory available. Must not be greater than storageCacheMaxMemorySize.

Default: 26214400

storageCacheSnapshotWriteColdDuration.description:
Duration at which the storage engine will snapshot the cache and write it to a new TSM file if the shard hasn’t received writes or deletes.

Default: 10 minutes

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

storageCompactFullWriteColdDuration.description:
Duration at which the storage engine will compact all TSM files in a shard if it hasn't received writes or deletes.

Default: 4 hours

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

storageCompactThroughputBurst.description:
Rate limit (in bytes per second) that TSM compactions can write to disk.

Default: 50331648

storageMaxConcurrentCompactions.description:
Maximum number of full and level compactions that can run concurrently. A value of 0 results in 50% of runtime.GOMAXPROCS(0) used at runtime. Any number greater than zero limits compactions to that value. This setting does not apply to cache snapshotting.

Default: 0

storageMaxIndexLogFileSize.description:
Size (in bytes) at which an index write-ahead log (WAL) file will compact into an index file. Lower sizes will cause log files to be compacted more quickly and result in lower heap usage at the expense of write throughput.

Default: 1048576

storageNoValidateFieldSize.description:
Skip field size validation on incoming write requests.

Default: false

storageRetentionCheckInterval.description:
Interval of retention policy enforcement checks. Must be greater than 0.

Default: 30 minutes

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

storageSeriesFileMaxConcurrentSnapshotCo.description:
Maximum number of snapshot compactions that can run concurrently across all series partitions in a database.

Default: 0

storageSeriesIdSetCacheSize.description:
Size of the internal cache used in the TSI index to store previously calculated series results. Cached results are returned quickly rather than needing to be recalculated when a subsequent query with the same tag key/value predicate is executed. Setting this value to 0 will disable the cache and may decrease query performance.

Default: 100

storageWalMaxConcurrentWrites.description:
Maximum number writes to the WAL directory to attempt at the same time. Setting this value to 0 results in number of processing units available x2.

Default: 0

storageWalMaxWriteDelay.description:
Maximum amount of time a write request to the WAL directory will wait when the maximum number of concurrent active writes to the WAL directory has been met. Set to 0 to disable the timeout.

Default: 10 minutes

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

uiDisabled.description:
Disable the InfluxDB user interface (UI). The UI is enabled by default.

Default: false

InfluxDBv3Core.description: All the customer-modifiable InfluxDB v3 Core parameters in Timestream for InfluxDB.

queryFileLimit.description:
Limits the number of Parquet files a query can access. If a query attempts to read more than this limit, InfluxDB 3 returns an error.

Default: 432

queryLogSize.description:
Defines the size of the query log. Up to this many queries remain in the log before older queries are evicted to make room for new ones.

Default: 1000

logFormat.description:
Defines the message format for logs.

Default: full

dataFusionNumThreads.description: Sets the maximum number of DataFusion runtime threads to use.

dataFusionRuntimeType.description:
Specifies the DataFusion tokio runtime type.

Default: multi-thread

dataFusionRuntimeDisableLifoSlot.description: Disables the LIFO slot of the DataFusion runtime.

dataFusionRuntimeEventInterval.description: Sets the number of scheduler ticks after which the scheduler of the DataFusion tokio runtime polls for external events–for example: timers, I/O.

dataFusionRuntimeGlobalQueueInterval.description: Sets the number of scheduler ticks after which the scheduler of the DataFusion runtime polls the global task queue.

dataFusionRuntimeMaxBlockingThreads.description: Specifies the limit for additional threads spawned by the DataFusion runtime.

dataFusionRuntimeMaxIoEventsPerTick.description: Configures the maximum number of events processed per tick by the tokio DataFusion runtime.

dataFusionRuntimeThreadKeepAlive.description: Sets a custom timeout for a thread in the blocking pool of the tokio DataFusion runtime.

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

dataFusionRuntimeThreadPriority.description:
Sets the thread priority for tokio DataFusion runtime workers.

Default: 10

dataFusionMaxParquetFanout.description:
When multiple parquet files are required in a sorted way (deduplication for example), specifies the maximum fanout.

Default: 1000

dataFusionUseCachedParquetLoader.description: Uses a cached parquet loader when reading parquet files from the object store.

dataFusionConfig.description: Provides custom configuration to DataFusion as a comma-separated list of key:value pairs.

maxHttpRequestSize.description:
Specifies the maximum size of HTTP requests.

Default: 10485760

forceSnapshotMemThreshold.description:
Specifies the threshold for the internal memory buffer. Supports either a percentage (portion of available memory) or absolute value in MB–for example: 70% or 100

Default: 70%

walSnapshotSize.description:
Defines the number of WAL files to attempt to remove in a snapshot. This, multiplied by the interval, determines how often snapshots are taken.

Default: 600

walMaxWriteBufferSize.description:
Specifies the maximum number of write requests that can be buffered before a flush must be executed and succeed.

Default: 100000

snapshottedWalFilesToKeep.description:
Specifies the number of snapshotted WAL files to retain in the object store. Flushing the WAL files does not clear the WAL files immediately; they are deleted when the number of snapshotted WAL files exceeds this number.

Default: 300

preemptiveCacheAge.description:
Specifies the interval to prefetch into the Parquet cache during compaction.

Default: 3d

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

parquetMemCachePrunePercentage.description:
Specifies the percentage of entries to prune during a prune operation on the in-memory Parquet cache.

Default: 0.1

parquetMemCachePruneInterval.description:
Sets the interval to check if the in-memory Parquet cache needs to be pruned.

Default: 1s

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

disableParquetMemCache.description: Disables the in-memory Parquet cache. By default, the cache is enabled.

parquetMemCacheQueryPathDuration.description:
Specifies the time window for caching recent Parquet files in memory.

Default: 5h

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

lastCacheEvictionInterval.description:
Specifies the interval to evict expired entries from the Last-N-Value cache, expressed as a human-readable duration–for example: 20s, 1m, 1h.

Default: 10s

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

distinctCacheEvictionInterval.description:
Specifies the interval to evict expired entries from the distinct value cache, expressed as a human-readable duration–for example: 20s, 1m, 1h.

Default: 10s

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

gen1Duration.description:
Specifies the duration that Parquet files are arranged into. Data timestamps land each row into a file of this duration. Supported durations are 1m, 5m, and 10m. These files are known as “generation 1” files that the compactor in InfluxDB 3 Enterprise can merge into larger generations.

Default: 10m

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

execMemPoolBytes.description:
Specifies the size of memory pool used during query execution. Can be given as absolute value in bytes or as a percentage of the total available memory–for example: 8000000000 or 10%.

Default: 20%

parquetMemCacheSize.description:
Specifies the size of the in-memory Parquet cache in megabytes or percentage of total available memory.

Default: 20%

walReplayFailOnError.description:
Determines whether WAL replay should fail when encountering errors.

Default: false

walReplayConcurrencyLimit.description:
Concurrency limit during WAL replay. Setting this number too high can lead to OOM. The default is dynamically determined.

Default: max(num_cpus, 10)

tableIndexCacheMaxEntries.description:
Specifies the maximum number of entries in the table index cache.

Default: 1000

tableIndexCacheConcurrencyLimit.description:
Limits the concurrency level for table index cache operations.

Default: 8

gen1LookbackDuration.description:
Specifies how far back to look when creating generation 1 Parquet files.

Default: 24h

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

retentionCheckInterval.description:
The interval at which retention policies are checked and enforced. Enter as a human-readable time–for example: 30m or 1h.

Default: 30m

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

deleteGracePeriod.description:
Specifies the grace period before permanently deleting data.

Default: 24h

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

hardDeleteDefaultDuration.description:
Sets the default duration for hard deletion of data.

Default: 90d

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

InfluxDBv3Enterprise.description: All the customer-modifiable InfluxDB v3 Enterprise parameters in Timestream for InfluxDB.

queryFileLimit.description:
Limits the number of Parquet files a query can access. If a query attempts to read more than this limit, InfluxDB 3 returns an error.

Default: 432

queryLogSize.description:
Defines the size of the query log. Up to this many queries remain in the log before older queries are evicted to make room for new ones.

Default: 1000

logFormat.description:
Defines the message format for logs.

Default: full

dataFusionNumThreads.description: Sets the maximum number of DataFusion runtime threads to use.

dataFusionRuntimeType.description:
Specifies the DataFusion tokio runtime type.

Default: multi-thread

dataFusionRuntimeDisableLifoSlot.description: Disables the LIFO slot of the DataFusion runtime.

dataFusionRuntimeEventInterval.description: Sets the number of scheduler ticks after which the scheduler of the DataFusion tokio runtime polls for external events–for example: timers, I/O.

dataFusionRuntimeGlobalQueueInterval.description: Sets the number of scheduler ticks after which the scheduler of the DataFusion runtime polls the global task queue.

dataFusionRuntimeMaxBlockingThreads.description: Specifies the limit for additional threads spawned by the DataFusion runtime.

dataFusionRuntimeMaxIoEventsPerTick.description: Configures the maximum number of events processed per tick by the tokio DataFusion runtime.

dataFusionRuntimeThreadKeepAlive.description: Sets a custom timeout for a thread in the blocking pool of the tokio DataFusion runtime.

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

dataFusionRuntimeThreadPriority.description:
Sets the thread priority for tokio DataFusion runtime workers.

Default: 10

dataFusionMaxParquetFanout.description:
When multiple parquet files are required in a sorted way (deduplication for example), specifies the maximum fanout.

Default: 1000

dataFusionUseCachedParquetLoader.description: Uses a cached parquet loader when reading parquet files from the object store.

dataFusionConfig.description: Provides custom configuration to DataFusion as a comma-separated list of key:value pairs.

Specifies the maximum size of HTTP requests.

Default: 10485760

parquetMemCachePruneInterval.description:

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

disableParquetMemCache.description: Disables the in-memory Parquet cache. By default, the cache is enabled.

parquetMemCacheQueryPathDuration.description:
Specifies the time window for caching recent Parquet files in memory.

Default: 5h

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

lastCacheEvictionInterval.description:
Specifies the interval to evict expired entries from the Last-N-Value cache, expressed as a human-readable duration–for example: 20s, 1m, 1h.

Default: 10s

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

Specifies the interval to evict expired entries from the distinct value cache, expressed as a human-readable duration–for example: 20s, 1m, 1h.

Default: 10s

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

gen1Duration.description:
Specifies the duration that Parquet files are arranged into. Data timestamps land each row into a file of this duration. Supported durations are 1m, 5m, and 10m. These files are known as “generation 1” files, which the compactor can merge into larger generations.

Default: 10m

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

execMemPoolBytes.description:
Specifies the size of memory pool used during query execution. Can be given as absolute value in bytes or as a percentage of the total available memory–for example: 8000000000 or 10%.

Default: 20%

Specifies the size of the in-memory Parquet cache in megabytes or percentage of total available memory.

Default: 20%

Determines whether WAL replay should fail when encountering errors.

Default: false

Concurrency limit during WAL replay. Setting this number too high can lead to OOM. The default is dynamically determined.

Default: max(num_cpus, 10)

Specifies the maximum number of entries in the table index cache.

Default: 8

gen1LookbackDuration.description:
Specifies how far back to look when creating generation 1 Parquet files.

Default: 24h

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

retentionCheckInterval.description:
The interval at which retention policies are checked and enforced. Enter as a human-readable time–for example: 30m or 1h.

Default: 30m

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

deleteGracePeriod.description:
Specifies the grace period before permanently deleting data.

Default: 24h

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

hardDeleteDefaultDuration.description:
Sets the default duration for hard deletion of data.

Default: 90d

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

ingestQueryInstances.description: Specifies number of instances in the DbCluster which can both ingest and query.

queryOnlyInstances.description: Specifies number of instances in the DbCluster which can only query.

dedicatedCompactor.description: Specifies if the compactor instance should be a standalone instance or not.

compactionRowLimit.description:
Specifies the soft limit for the number of rows per file that the compactor writes. The compactor may write more rows than this limit.

Default: 1000000

compactionMaxNumFilesPerPlan.description:
Sets the maximum number of files included in any compaction plan.

Default: 500

compactionGen2Duration.description:
Specifies the duration of the first level of compaction (gen2). Later levels of compaction are multiples of this duration. This value should be equal to or greater than the gen1 duration.

Default: 20m

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

compactionMultipliers.description:
Specifies a comma-separated list of multiples defining the duration of each level of compaction. The number of elements in the list determines the number of compaction levels. The first element specifies the duration of the first level (gen3); subsequent levels are multiples of the previous level.

Default: 3,4,6,5

compactionCleanupWait.description:
Specifies the amount of time that the compactor waits after finishing a compaction run to delete files marked as needing deletion during that compaction run.

Default: 10m

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

compactionCheckInterval.description:
Specifies how often the compactor checks for new compaction work to perform.

Default: 10s

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

lastValueCacheDisableFromHistory.description: Disables populating the last-N-value cache from historical data. If disabled, the cache is still populated with data from the write-ahead log (WAL).

distinctValueCacheDisableFromHistory.description: Disables populating the distinct value cache from historical data. If disabled, the cache is still populated with data from the write-ahead log (WAL).

replicationInterval.description:
Specifies the interval at which data replication occurs between cluster nodes.

Default: 250ms

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

catalogSyncInterval.description:
Defines how often the catalog synchronizes across cluster nodes.

Default: 10s

durationType.description: The type of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

value.description: The value of duration for InfluxDB parameters.

items.description: A list of Timestream for InfluxDB instance summaries belonging to the cluster.

nextToken.description: Token from a previous call of the operation. When this value is provided, the service returns results from where the previous response left off.

id.description: The service-generated unique identifier of the DB instance.

name.description: A service-generated name for the DB instance based on the customer-supplied name for the DB cluster.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB instance.

endpoint.description: The endpoint used to connect to InfluxDB. The default InfluxDB port is 8086.

port.description: The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections.

networkType.description: Specifies whether the network type of the Timestream for InfluxDB instance is IPv4, which can communicate over IPv4 protocol only, or DUAL, which can communicate over both IPv4 and IPv6 protocols.

dbInstanceType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB instance type to run InfluxDB on.

dbStorageType.description: The storage type for your DB instance.

allocatedStorage.description: The amount of storage allocated for your DB storage type in GiB (gibibytes).

instanceMode.description: Specifies the DB instance's role in the cluster.

instanceModes.description: Specifies the DB instance's roles in the cluster.

tags.description: A list of tags used to categorize and track resources.

name.description: This customer-supplied name uniquely identifies the DB instance when interacting with the Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB API and CLI commands.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DB instance.

endpoint.description: The endpoint used to connect to InfluxDB. The default InfluxDB port is 8086.

port.description: The port number on which InfluxDB accepts connections.

networkType.description: Specifies whether the networkType of the Timestream for InfluxDB instance is IPV4, which can communicate over IPv4 protocol only, or DUAL, which can communicate over both IPv4 and IPv6 protocols.

dbInstanceType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB instance type that InfluxDB runs on.

dbStorageType.description: The Timestream for InfluxDB DB storage type that InfluxDB stores data on.

allocatedStorage.description: The amount of storage allocated for your DB storage type (in gibibytes).

deploymentType.description: Specifies whether the Timestream for InfluxDB is deployed as Single-AZ or with a MultiAZ Standby for High availability.

vpcSubnetIds.description: A list of VPC subnet IDs associated with the DB instance.

publiclyAccessible.description: Indicates if the DB instance has a public IP to facilitate access.

vpcSecurityGroupIds.description: A list of VPC security group IDs associated with the DB instance.

dbParameterGroupIdentifier.description: The id of the DB parameter group assigned to your DB instance.

availabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone in which the DB instance resides.

secondaryAvailabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone in which the standby instance is located when deploying with a MultiAZ standby instance.

logDeliveryConfiguration.description: Configuration for sending InfluxDB engine logs to send to specified S3 bucket.

influxAuthParametersSecretArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Secrets Manager secret containing the initial InfluxDB authorization parameters. The secret value is a JSON formatted key-value pair holding InfluxDB authorization values: organization, bucket, username, and password.

dbClusterId.description: Specifies the DbCluster to which this DbInstance belongs to.

instanceMode.description: Specifies the DbInstance's role in the cluster.

instanceModes.description: Specifies the DbInstance's roles in the cluster.
